case_title: SSANGYONG INTERNATIONAL INC. vs. EVANS, BARRY IND/DBA EVANS MUSIC et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SSANGYONG INTERNATIONAL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, BARRY IND/DBA EVANS MUSIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3801 THIRD ST #575, LEASE FORFEITED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SSANGYONG INTERNATIONAL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, BARRY IND/DBA EVANS MUSIC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SSANGYONG INTERNATIONAL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, BARRY IND/DBA EVANS MUSIC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SSANGYONG INTERNATIONAL INC. SERVED SEP-29-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, BARRY IND/DBA EVANS MUSIC
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SSANGYONG INTERNATIONAL INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, BARRY IND/DBA EVANS MUSIC
